findings.evidence: `code/TauCeti/Geometry/Diffeomorphism/Action.lean:80` proves the subgroup instance by coercing `f : H` to `Diff I M n`; `code/TauCeti/Topology/Algebra/HomeomorphAction.lean:56` has the identical special-case proof for `Subgroup (E ≃ₜ E)`, while `rg` finds no generic Mathlib/TauCeti subgroup `ContinuousConstSMul` transfer.
findings.fix: Replace this with a general instance such as `instance Subgroup.continuousConstSMul {G α} [TopologicalSpace α] [Group G] [MulAction G α] [ContinuousConstSMul G α] (H : Subgroup G) : ContinuousConstSMul H α := ⟨fun h => continuous_const_smul (h : G)⟩`, then derive the diffeomorphism and homeomorphism cases by typeclass search.
findings.issue: `applySubgroupContinuousConstSMul` is a second special-case subgroup transfer for `ContinuousConstSMul`, duplicating the same pattern already used for homeomorphism subgroups instead of proving the natural generic instance.

summary: One subgroup-continuity instance is stated at the diffeomorphism-specific level even though the same argument is the natural generic subgroup transfer for any continuous constant action.
